prompt: Write a macOS SwiftUI view showing a red Text("Hello"). Output only the Swift code.
Write a macOS SwiftUI observable view model class named Counter with an Int count and a view that displays it. Output only Swift.
Write a macOS SwiftUI view with a blue rounded rectangle (corner radius 12) using the current idiom. Output only Swift.
Write a macOS SwiftUI TabView with two tabs (Home, Settings) using the current macOS 15+ idiom. Output only Swift.
Write a macOS SwiftUI Toggle tinted purple using the current idiom. Output only Swift.
Write a macOS SwiftUI master-detail layout with a sidebar list and a detail pane. Output only Swift.
Write a macOS SwiftUI menu-bar (status item) app scene. Output only Swift.
Write a macOS SwiftUI Settings (preferences) scene with a form. Output only Swift.
Bridge an AppKit NSTextView into a macOS SwiftUI view. Output only Swift.
Write a macOS SwiftUI view that loads data asynchronously when it appears, using the current idiom. Output only Swift.
Write a macOS SwiftUI view with a @State String and an onChange handler using the current two-parameter idiom. Output only Swift.
Write a macOS SwiftUI bar chart of (label, value) data using Swift Charts. Output only Swift.
